description: Create a scene where the character 'dwanko_run' carries the 'nametag.png' prop using hierarchical rigging. Animate the character moving from the left side of the screen to the right over 20-40 frames, ensuring the prop follows the character via the parenting connection rather than manual keyframing. Render the result as an MP4 to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/rigged_run.mp4.
